summary: Run a multi-family pr1394_enigma harness campaign with four executable-now mechanism families plus one campaign-governance reset family. Keep solo evidence separate first: recurrence transition, late train-to-deploy internalization, downstream-state selection, and deployment bit allocation each get independent packs under a downstream-first admission contract. Promote only families with repeated directional wins over matched controls on quantized_sliding_window score_bpb, then allow limited pairwise composition among survivors with non-overlapping mechanisms.
campaign_goal: Validate the pg_enigma campaign workflow itself on the frozen `frontier_rebase/pr1394/train_gpt_human.py` base by running only honest, consequential, executable-now families that can credibly reduce downstream `score_bpb`/sliding-window val_bpb relative to the published SP8192 + GPTQ embeddings + depth recurrence + MuonEq-R + SDClip stack.

families.name: Downstream-First Lane-Split Admission Reset
families.lane: campaign admission and promotion on downstream quantized_sliding_window score_bpb
families.phase_window: whole campaign; applies at admission, pack ranking, and promotion
families.why_keep: It directly tests the harness failure mode this cycle is meant to expose: proxy or mixed-lane ranking on a frozen frontier base.
families.minimal_probe: Run the first solo packs with identical candidate sets but enforce downstream-first ranking, separate pre-quant diagnostics, and explicit control-spread reporting; abort promotion if the lane contract is violated.
families.expected_signal: Cleaner family ordering, fewer false positives from pre-quant-only movement, and explicit control-stability evidence before any mutation or composition.
mutate_after_survival: tighten abort thresholds only after one full pack proves stable controls
reuse as campaign policy for all later packs rather than spawning a second reset family
families.pack_rationale: This is not a model-side novelty pack; it is the selector/admission contract every solo pack must inherit before composition is allowed.

families.name: Progressive Loop Ramp Instead Of One-Shot Recurrence Enable
families.lane: training-side regime transition at recurrence onset
families.phase_window: mid training around loop enable through late stabilization
families.why_keep: It is the cleanest executable recurrence family and attacks a real invariant in the published base without drifting into scalar-only retuning.
families.minimal_probe: Compile 3 realizations of the loop-ramp program with bounded staged recurrence activation and compare against 2 frozen controls on downstream score_bpb plus pre-quant diagnostic traces near the loop transition.
families.expected_signal: Reduced recurrence-onset penalty and at least one realization showing directional downstream improvement beyond control spread.
mutate_after_survival: adjust stage boundary placement within the same ramp family
adjust partial-to-full repeat schedule only after one realization clears controls twice
families.pack_rationale: This belongs in solo mid-training packs because it changes the runtime phase program before export and should be isolated from selector or deployment changes first.

families.name: Late Quantization-Envelope Internalization
families.why_keep: It attacks the train/deploy mismatch directly and is distinct from both selector and export-bit allocation lines.
families.minimal_probe: Compile 3 realizations with late-only clip-envelope pressure and compare the downstream score_bpb translation gap versus 2 frozen controls.
families.expected_signal: A narrower pre-quant to downstream degradation gap, with at least one realization improving downstream score_bpb even if pre-quant gains are small.
mutate_after_survival: vary onset timing of late pressure
vary envelope strength schedule within bounded late-only forms
families.pack_rationale: This needs its own late-training pack because combining it early with recurrence changes would obscure whether the gain comes from the late train-to-export contract.

families.name: EMA Portfolio Selection On The True Score Lane
families.phase_window: same-run late state selection and final export choice
families.why_keep: It is the cleanest same-run selector family and can move the true objective without changing the training stack.
families.minimal_probe: Compile 3 realizations spanning raw/EMA/multi-timescale EMA selectors and compare same-trajectory exported states against 2 raw-export controls on downstream score_bpb only.
families.expected_signal: One selector realization repeatedly beats terminal raw export beyond control spread while pre-quant metrics remain mostly unchanged.
mutate_after_survival: narrow the EMA portfolio to the two best state families
add one extra selector timescale only after repeated solo wins
families.pack_rationale: This is a pure selector lane and should be evaluated in selector packs after training is held fixed so attribution stays clean.

families.name: Sensitivity-Allocated Matrix Bit Budget
families.lane: deployment representation under fixed byte budget
families.why_keep: It changes where precision lives under a fixed budget and is orthogonal to training-side or selector-side families.
families.minimal_probe: Compile 3 realizations of sensitivity-ranked bit allocation with fixed total bytes and compare downstream score_bpb versus 2 uniform-bit controls.
families.expected_signal: Repeated downstream score_bpb gains at essentially unchanged bytes_total, with stable high-sensitivity matrix assignments across realizations.
mutate_after_survival: refine sensitivity cutoff bands only after solo support
families.pack_rationale: This belongs in deployment packs because it should be judged purely as an export allocation rule, not conflated with training or state-selection changes.

stop_doing: Do not rank or promote by blended pre-quant and downstream metrics; downstream quantized_sliding_window score_bpb is the deciding lane for this cycle.
Do not spend executable slots on blocked controller, handoff, or branch-portfolio ideas until the active harness has the required online primitives.
Do not keep duplicate recurrence or selector variants in round-0 ontology search; one representative family per mechanism is enough.
Do not allow composition before solo family evidence shows repeated directional support over matched controls on the frozen pr1394 base.
Do not treat trivial threshold nudges as standalone families.

pack_order: selector_pack: lane_reset governance baked into all packs
pairwise_composition_pack: only for solo survivors with repeated support
hybrid_pack: only if pairwise support is directional and non-conflicting
notes: Use 2 controls in every executable pack: one frozen published-base control and one repeated control to estimate spread.

For executable-now solo packs, target 4 family candidates + 2 controls when possible; if compiler yields enough clean realizations, allow up to 6 candidate slots but cap any one family at 2 realizations per pack.
Keep solo packs single-family before any pairwise composition so lineage of confidence stays attributable.
Selector and deployment packs should reuse identical training artifacts where possible to reduce noise and isolate the attacked lane.
If controls drift or downstream metrics are missing, stop the campaign and treat it as harness failure rather than family failure.

promotion_policy.family_survival_rule: A family survives solo screening only if at least 2 realizations across one or more solo packs beat the control mean on downstream score_bpb by more than observed control spread, no realization shows a major adverse artifact-size regression except where size is the explicit tie-break lane, and the lane_reset contract reports stable controls and complete downstream metrics.
promotion_policy.composition_entry_rule: A family may enter pairwise composition only after solo survival is established with repeated downstream support, explicit lane-aligned evidence, and a mechanism story that remains distinct from the intended partner.

composition_policy.hybrid_entry_rule: Only compose families that each have solo survival plus non-overlapping first-order mechanisms. Require at least one positive pairwise realization before any three-way hybrid is admitted.
notes: Preferred first pairings are `loop_ramp + ema_selector`, `quant_clip_anneal + ema_selector`, and `sensitivity_bits + ema_selector` because selector composition is low-confound and lane-clean.
Defer `loop_ramp + quant_clip_anneal` until both are individually strong; both touch late training dynamics and are higher-confound.
Treat `lane_reset` as mandatory campaign governance, not as a compositional mechanism consuming pairwise slots.
If a pair beats only on pre-quant or only by size reduction without downstream improvement, retire the pair from this campaign.

campaign_handoff.global_instructions: Execute on the frozen `frontier_rebase/pr1394/train_gpt_human.py` base using `ncycle/pr1394_enigma_cycle.json` as the default harness config. Use the published pr1394 stack as the only base contract. Every pack must log downstream quantized_sliding_window score_bpb first, pre-quant val_bpb second, control spread explicitly, and artifact bytes only as a tie-breaker. Keep one dossier per family, one evidence table per realization, and do not promote on narrative alone.
control_principles: Always include 2 matched controls per pack.
Repeat at least one control across adjacent packs to estimate drift.
Abort the pack if downstream metrics are missing or controls are unstable.
admission_principles: Admit only the five kept families from this distillation.
Treat `lane_reset` as the campaign rulebook that governs the others.
Keep solo packs single-family until solo evidence is positive twice.
metric_principles: Primary metric is downstream `score_bpb` from quantized_sliding_window when present.
Pre-quant val_bpb is diagnostic only and cannot overrule a worse downstream result.
Artifact size matters only as a tie-breaker among directionally positive downstream results.
implementation_principles: Use only honest catalog-executable families in round 0.
Compile at pass@k before packing: k=2 for the reset family, k=3 for each executable mechanism family.
Preserve lineage: record family id, realization id, control ids, pack id, and promotion decision at each step.
